practice.name: Problem 20 (2015 AMC 10B)
practice.statement: This is a 2015 AMC 10B problem focusing on AM-GM inequality and algebra. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2015_AMC_10B_Problems/Problem_20).

practice.name: Problem 19 (2018 AMC 12B)
practice.statement: This is a 2018 AMC 12B problem focusing on Cauchy-Schwarz inequality. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2018_AMC_12B_Problems/Problem_19).
